title: Webinar: Environmental Technologies
description: ERDC's patented environmental solutions have strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of these technologies can be beneficial for business growth and development.
text:
The U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC)’s patented environmental solutions offer high potential for business growth and diversification. Business entities with manufacturing or distribution capabilities are invited to attend an informational webinar on Tuesday, September 17, from 2:30 to 3:30 pm CT to learn how commercialization of these technologies can be beneficial for business growth and development.
Why You Should Participate
During this webinar, attendees will have the opportunity to engage directly with ERDC inventors and discover how ERDC’s streamlined licensing process makes it easier to evaluate and pursue market potential of ERDC innovations that have dual-use applicability. Participants will be introduced to the following ERDC patents:
High-Concentration Bleach Generator, portable bleach generator for purifying and disinfecting drinking water in remote locations
Munitions Detector, high-performance liquid chromotographic (HPLC) detector for conventional and novel munitions
Predictive Environmental Modeling System (PEMS), comprehensive, predictive environmental modeling system and database
Water Diagnostics Operations Gear (WaterDOG), a water sensing toolkit that rapidly collects, monitors and reports water quality data from any water source
Attendees will also learn how they can submit innovative solutions for funding consideration by ERDC.
Date and Time
Virtual
Tuesday, September 17
2:30 – 3:30 pm CT
Speakers
